headline: GraniteShares Launches NTAL, TDCL and BTDL, 2x Long ETFs on NetApp, Teradata and Bitdeer
summary: GraniteShares Launches NTAL, TDCL and BTDL, 2x Long ETFs on NetApp, Teradata and Bitdeer New single-stock ETFs give investors amplified leveraged daily participation tied to NetApp, Inc. (NASDAQ: NTAP), Teradata Corporation (NYSE: TDC) and Bitdeer Technologies Group (NASDAQ: BTDR).
